description_long: This is a three-tier shelving unit with a sturdy black metal frame and three flat, rectangular brown shelves made of what appears to be particleboard or MDF. The frame features evenly spaced holes along the vertical supports, likely for adjustable shelf placement or added structural support. The shelves are open on all sides, providing easy access and visibility to stored items. The design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or storage rooms in urban environments. The overall construction suggests it is designed to hold moderate to heavy loads, with a focus on function over decorative elements.
description: A robust, three-tier shelving unit with a black metal frame and brown particleboard shelves, open on all sides for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three shelves and the full width of the unit, with the black frame and brown shelves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the unit, with the depth of the shelves and the vertical frame supports in focus.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the open structure and all three shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, highlighting the depth and side frame details.
